people-design.title: design & deploy
people-design.promise: build learning experiences your team actually wants to use.
people-design.quadrantStory: you're in the people × design quadrant — where behaviour change meets creative craft.
people-design.story: we'll work together to design and deploy effective learning experiences that stick. from workshops to full programmes, we combine learning science with creative design to make training people actually engage with.
people-design.crossover: our design work is always informed by research — we measure what matters so your investment pays off.

outcomes.title: custom learning experience
outcomes.detail: tailored to your needs, context, and audience.

outcomes.title: facilitator toolkit
outcomes.detail: everything your team needs to deliver independently.

outcomes.title: engagement metrics
outcomes.detail: know what's working and what needs iteration.

people-research.title: pinpoint & prove
people-research.promise: show exactly where your approach moves the needle.
people-research.quadrantStory: you're in the people × research quadrant — where rigorous measurement meets human complexity.
people-research.story: we'll help you measure and prove the impact of your learning programmes, training initiatives, and behaviour change efforts. real evidence, not just feedback forms.
people-research.crossover: research without design is just measurement — we help you act on what we find.

outcomes.title: evidence of impact
outcomes.detail: credible data that satisfies stakeholders and funders.

outcomes.title: evaluation framework
outcomes.detail: a reusable system for ongoing measurement.

outcomes.title: actionable insights
outcomes.detail: clear next steps based on what the data tells us.

product-design.title: build & iterate
product-design.promise: launch a polished, tested product in two sprints.
product-design.quadrantStory: you're in the product × design quadrant — where learning science meets rapid prototyping.
product-design.story: we'll prototype and test your product with real users, iterating fast until it works. whether it's a learning tool, a toy, or an interactive experience, we build things people love to use.
product-design.crossover: great products are shaped by evidence — we test with users, not assumptions.

outcomes.title: working prototype
outcomes.detail: functional and tested with real users.

outcomes.title: UDL-informed design
outcomes.detail: accessible and inclusive from the start.

outcomes.title: iteration roadmap
outcomes.detail: prioritised improvements based on user feedback.

product-research.title: test & validate
product-research.promise: prove your product meets accessibility and learning standards.
product-research.quadrantStory: you're in the product × research quadrant — where user experience meets rigorous validation.
product-research.story: we'll validate your product against UDL and usability standards, giving you the evidence you need to ship with confidence.
product-research.crossover: validation is the beginning of better design — every finding becomes a design opportunity.

outcomes.title: accessibility audit
outcomes.detail: UDL compliance and inclusive design assessment.

outcomes.title: user research insights
outcomes.detail: what real users think, feel, and struggle with.
